tasks.subject: Task 0: Project setup & toolchain
tasks.description: Scaffold SvelteKit + Svelte 5 + adapter-static (prerender), Tailwind v4, mdsvex, KaTeX, Vitest. Verify: `npm run build && npm run test`.

tasks.subject: Task 1: lib/stats.ts core
tasks.description: Pure unit-tested stats: mean/variance(n-1)/sd/SE, normalPdf/Cdf/Quantile, seeded RNG, drawSample(normal/exponential/bimodal/uniform). Verify: `npm run test src/lib/stats.test.ts`.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Design system
tasks.description: Warm light tokens (coral/amber on off-white), friendly sans, Button/Card primitives via frontend-design. Verify in chrome.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Teaching kit structure
tasks.description: lessons.ts manifest (14 lessons/3 tracks), localStorage progress store (tested), LessonLayout/TrackNav/ProgressDots. Verify: progress test + chrome.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Teaching kit content components
tasks.description: Callouts, FormelZeigen (KaTeX+legend), Begriff tooltip, RCode, Widget frame, Selbsttest (scoring tested), /kit demo. Verify: Selbsttest test + chrome.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Keystone widget StichprobenverteilungWidget
tasks.description: Population selector + n slider + draw one/×100; sampling distribution builds live, normal overlay, SE=σ/√n, ZGW under skew. Histogram + binCounts (tested). Verify: tests + chrome end-to-end.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Keystone lesson page + nav (FIRST USABLE MILESTONE)
tasks.description: Lektion 1 mdsvex page: intro→widget→FormelZeigen→Intuition→Selbsttest; wired to nav+progress. Verify: build + chrome end-to-end.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Lektion 2 — Was ist Statistik?
tasks.description: Sortier-Spiel widget. Per-lesson DoD (German, FormelZeigen, 3Q Selbsttest, frontend-design, chrome end-to-end, nav+progress).

tasks.subject: Task 8: Lektion 3 — Wahrscheinlichkeit & Bayes
tasks.description: Bayes-Box 10.000-person grid. Add+test Bayes helper. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Lektion 4 — Verteilungen & Glockenkurve
tasks.description: Flächen-Schieber (pnorm live, z↔x). Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Lektion 5 — Konfidenzintervalle
tasks.description: Sampling-Maschine (100 CIs, fixed μ). Add+test t-quantile. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Lektion 6 — Hypothesentest & p-Wert
tasks.description: α/β/Power visualizer + p-Wert-Würfelspiel. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 12: Lektion 7 — t-Tests
tasks.description: Signal-vs-Rausch-Regler. Build shared AnnahmenBaum. Add+test t-statistic. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 13: Lektion 8 — Chi-Quadrat
tasks.description: Kontingenztafel-Editor (expected from margins, χ²/df/p tested, E<5 warning). Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 14: Lektion 9 — ANOVA
tasks.description: F-Ratio-Regler + FWER-Roulette. Build shared SSZerlegung. Add+test SS/F. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 15: Lektion 10 — Korrelation
tasks.description: Scatter-Builder (Pearson vs Spearman). Add+test correlation helpers. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 16: Lektion 11 — Regression
tasks.description: Regression-Builder (line/residuals/R², reuse SSZerlegung, leverage). Add+test OLS. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 17: Lektion 12 — Design & Power
tasks.description: Power-Spielplatz (4 coupled sliders + curve). Add+test power helper. Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 18: Lektion 13 — Pseudoreplikation
tasks.description: Pseudoreplikations-Falle (p/df inflate). Per-lesson DoD.

tasks.subject: Task 19: Lektion 14 — Welcher Test?
tasks.description: Entscheidungsbaum-Spiel, reuse AnnahmenBaum. Per-lesson DoD.
